package rulecoverage

func PositiveBlockingCallWhileLocked() string {
    ruleID := "blocking_call_while_locked"
    family := "concurrency"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Potentially blocking calls observed between Lock and Unlock."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
